title: AI expert Alex Goryachev to close VCU Research Weeks with keynote on higher education's role in shaping AI
description: AI expert Alex Goryachev will keynote VCU's 2026 Research Weeks on April 29, focusing on how universities can lead AI's shift in higher education. The event runs 3-5 p.m. at VCU's College of Health Professions.

title: Salesforce Expands Global Partner Network to Accelerate AI Deployments
description: Discover how Salesforce is expanding its global partner network to enhance AI deployments, driving innovation and collaboration across industries. Explore the impact on businesses and the future of AI integration.

title: Data centres must coexist with frugal AI in India, say experts at Frugal Innovation Forum
description: Experts at the Frugal Innovation Forum emphasize the need for data centres to coexist with frugal AI for sustainable growth in India.

title: This Ultimate AI Stock Has Gained 26% This Year and Still Isn't Done
description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing produces almost every artificial intelligence (AI) chip.

title: Unions Attack AI for Menacing Human Jobs
description: At Futurism, I focus on the intersection of technology and power — examining the economics, history, and politics behind today’s dystopian headlines. As a writer, I’m interested in topics ranging from AI’s impact on labor to startups nobody asked for. My prior work includes bylines in Jacobin, Verso, and Blue Labyrinths.
